decision: Add Build/version+SBOM panel to settings with a shared 2nd-level sub-nav (app/settings/layout.tsx), mirroring novabrain's admin Build tab. daax is Next.js/Node not Go/Azure: GO RUNTIME->Node runtime+Next.js; deployment fields map to daax reality (mode/registry/image/tag/workspace, env-driven, hidden when empty). SBOM = single 'app' component (no Backend/Frontend split), CycloneDX+SPDX via syft dir:. served from whitelisted sbom/ dir.
why: Operator goal: build version info into settings, mature settings, stronger 2nd-level menu, all info from reference images. Reference logic at ~/prj/n/novabrain.
reversibility: reversible; additive files + one new layout

summary: Added app/settings/layout.tsx (2nd-level sub-nav: General/Build/Releases/Voice/Debug), app/settings/build/page.tsx + components/settings/BuildPanel.tsx (version cards + deployment + SBOM viewer), app/api/build + app/api/build/sbom routes, lib/build/{build-info,sbom-format}.ts, scripts/generate-sbom.sh (bun run sbom:generate). SBOM via syft javascript-package-cataloger on node_modules (1990 CycloneDX / 996 SPDX with licenses).
